content:
## API Calls

# Vector-only
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8020/v1/context \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "query": "<QUERY_TEXT>",
    "scope_id": "corvia-introspect",
    "limit": 10,
    "expand_graph": false
  }'


# Graph-expanded
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8020/v1/context \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "query": "<QUERY_TEXT>",
    "scope_id": "corvia-introspect",
    "limit": 10,
    "expand_graph": true
  }'
```
